headlines.summary: Oil prices collapsed on Wednesday as markets continued to digest reports that the U.S. and Iran were discussing a one-page memorandum designed to pause the conflict and create a framework for broader negotiations. Brent crude was down 8.58%, to trade at $100.4 per barrel on Wedne

headlines.title: Saudi Arabia Cuts June Oil Prices by Less Than Expected as Hormuz Risks Persist
headlines.summary: Saudi Arabia has reduced the official selling price of its flagship crude loading for Asia in June from the May record high, but the price cut was less than expected. Next month’s supply from the world’s top crude exporter would still see the second-highest premium to benchmarks

headlines.title: Oil Prices Fall Below $100 After Trump Pauses Hormuz Escort Plan
headlines.summary: Crude oil prices extended losses for a second day today, after President Trump said the United States would pause its plan to escort vessels out of the Strait of Hormuz just a couple of days after it was announced. headlines.title: Energy Security Concerns Force the EU to Reconsider Domestic Gas Drilling
